title: Drakon
description:
dark theme minecraft texture pack
this texture pack good for [horror] , dimension effect 
version 1.16 to latest
body:
This time i present you Drakon pack
Are you bored with same boring Minecraft world?
This time i present you Minecraft [Drakon].
After applying this texture pack , your Minecraft will change into dark theme minecraft world
with lighting effect and a unique color combination.
all changed item will glow in night.
this texture pack good for [horror] , dimension effect 

Changes Are:-

All trees will change into colourful trees:-

1)Acacia Tree
2)Azalea Tree
3)Birch Tree
4)Dark Oak Tree
5)Flower Azalea Tree
6)Jungle Tree
7)Mangrove Tree
8)Oak Tree
9)Spruce Tree

other changes:-

grass block
tall grass
ender preal
beacon beam
end portal frame
crying obsidian
dead bush
all veins
cobweb
magma block
camfire particles
bamboo
cave vines
sweet berry
netherwart
end rod
sugar cane
dead bush
lava
colormap

environment changes:-
Sky
Sun
Moon
End Sky
Water
clouds

Some additional features:
-No blur pumpkin vision

Enjoy the Minecraft [Drakon]

 

Thanks for downloading.
